content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type and context: This is a pull request review for "feat: Review mouse Hdac1 ISO annotations" with 23 changed files, primarily adding a new gene review for mouse Hdac1 with associated publications and data files.

b. Request type: This is a code review request. The user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
- PR adds mouse Hdac1 gene review with ISO evidence code focus
- 23 files added: main review YAML, GOA data, UniProt data, and 20 publication files
- This follows the ai-gene-review project structure for gene annotation reviews
- Part of ISO evidence code review project

d. Main tasks and challenges:
- Review the gene review YAML structure and content quality
- Check adherence to project guidelines in CLAUDE.md
- Validate file organization and naming conventions
- Assess data quality and completeness
- Check for any potential issues or improvements

e. Plan of action:
- Read key project files (CLAUDE.md, schema) to understand guidelines
- Examine the main review file structure and content
- Spot-check publication files for quality
- Run validation if possible
- Provide comprehensive review feedback

f. Limitations: I may not be able to run all validation commands if dependencies aren't installed, but I can still provide thorough manual review.
</analysis>

input.body: ### Code Review in Progress I'll review this PR focusing on the mouse Hdac1 ISO annotations. Let me analyze the code quality, structure, and adherence to project guidelines. #### Todo List: - [ ] Read project guidelines and schema - [ ] Review main gene review YAML file structure and content - [ ] Check file organization and naming conventions - [ ] Validate data quality and completeness - [ ] Spot-check publication files - [ ] Run validation if possible - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23334463261) | [View branch](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/tree/feat/review-mouse-hdac1)
